Off Calendar Apr-13-2026 Continued To Jun-22-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-08-2025 Continued To Apr-13-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer Of Petitioner Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. To Will Contest Of Bin Bin Thomas
Off Calendar Nov-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert E. White and Seth Skootsky for petitioner and moving party Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
Ciaran O'Sullivan for contestant Bin Bin Thomas.

The matter was called for hearing on the Demurrer of Petitioner Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. to Will Contest of Bin Bin Thomas.

Mr. White contested the Court's tentative decision to overrule the demurrer. Counsel provided oral argument in support of their positions while on the record. After hearing oral argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling and overruled the demurrer. Mr.O'Sullivan submitted a proposed order to the Court at the hearing.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Court reporter: Esther Au, CSR #14594, estheraucsr14594@gmail.com, 415-699-1341 (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-09-2025 Continued To Aug-25-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (in person):

Seth Skootsky, Esq., for Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., Petitioner.

Ciaran O'Sullivan, Esq., for Bin Bin Thomas, Contestant.

At the outset, the court acknowledges the timing of the filing of the Will Contest and the issue of service of the related summons. At the court's query, Mr. Skootsky and Mr. O'Sulliuvan discuss the subject matter. Mr. Skootsky advises that he intends to file a Demurrer as soon as he is served with notice and confirms that he is willing to accept service on behalf of his client, via email. Service of Summons of Will Contest shall be served on or by Jun-13-2025; If service is not effectuated by the deadline, the Will Contest will be stricken. There is discussion of a date for the Demurrer and pursuant to Counsel's agreement, the Demurrer shall be set for hearing on Aug-20-2025 at 2:00 pm as authorized in open court. The deadline to file the above Demurrer is set for Jul-14-2025. The deadlines to file any Objection to the preceding and any responses thereon shall be done so pursuant to statute.

The subject matter is continued to Aug-25-2025 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-24-2025 Continued To Jun-09-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Seth Scootsky appeared via zoom for Wells Fargo Bank (petitioner).
Ciaran O'Sullivan appeared in person for the objector.

Mr. O'Sullivan appeared in person to object to the admission of this will. Parties to file a written objection on or before April 24, 2025, the response to the objection is due by May 12, 2025. The matter is continued to June 09, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Musto. Not reported.
